In Gaza City, nine people were wounded after an air raid hit near the Broadcasting and Television Authority building in the Tel al-Hawa neighbourhood, southwest of the city. articles.title: UAE condemns drone strike near nuclear plant as ‘dangerous escalation’
articles.summary: UAE condemns drone strike near nuclear plant as ‘dangerous escalation’ The United Arab Emirates has condemned the drone strike that sparked a fire near the Barakah nuclear power plant in the west of the country, without assigning responsibility. The Foreign Ministry described the incident as a “dangerous escalation” and an “unacceptable act of aggression” that poses a direct threat to national security. It added that “no threat to security and sovereignty will be tolerated, regardless of the circumstances.”

Pezeshkian said that the US-Israeli plan failed due to the "cooperation and responsibility of Iran’s neighbours in preventing any misuse of their territory against our country was a valuable and commendable act". articles.title: National Gas Prices Near Record High
articles.summary: For decades — coincidentally, at least since the Iranian Revolution and hostage crisis of 1979-80 — the price at the pump has been a crucial lens through which Americans judge a president’s success or failure. In this conflict, the impact on gasoline prices matters more to individual Americans than the broader military campaign, the removal of Iran’s enriched uranium, or sending in ground troops. Bloomberg News Senior US Oil Reporter Kevin Crowley tells Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend, it’s not going well. (Source: Bloomberg)
